name: Zero Agent
description: AI agent platform with real-time chat, code execution, and multi-provider LLM support

env.description: Shared secret between server and runner for internal API auth
Secret key for signing JWT tokens. Must be set in production.
Encryption key for stored secrets (API keys, tokens). Falls back to JWT_SECRET if unset.
OpenRouter API key for LLM access. Can also be set later via admin panel.
Brave Search API key for web search. Can also be set later via admin panel.
Full public URL of the app (e.g. https://zero.example.com). Used for passkey auth and webhooks.
WebAuthn relying party ID — the domain without protocol (e.g. zero.example.com)
Display name shown during passkey registration
Allowed CORS origin. Set to your app URL in production.
Docker image for agent session containers (built by CD pipeline)
